idea-plugin.name: AI Git Commit Writer
idea-plugin.description: AI Git Commit Writer — generate Git commit messages from selected changes using any OpenAI-compatible API. Enter your Base URL and API Key, click Fetch Models, pick a model, then click in the Commit panel.
idea-plugin.change-notes: v0.4.2: "Fetch Models" button sits beside the Model dropdown. Test Configuration is the only bottom button.

action.description: Generate a commit message from the selected Git changes
